title: HOWLERS Natural 12.5cm Pack of 200 Rawhide Dog Chew Munch Sticks | Natural Dog Chews Stick For All Dogs | Delicious Dog Chew Sticks For Your Furry Friend
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
100% NATURAL RAWHIDE: Premium dog chews made from natural rawhide, ensuring a safe and satisfying chew experience for your canine companion.
PERFECT SIZE FOR CHEWING: Each pack contains 100 munchy sticks, each measuring 12.5cm, ideal for dogs of all sizes to enjoy their chew time.
PROMOTES DENTAL HEALTH: These chew sticks for dogs help in cleaning teeth and strengthening gums, making them not just treats but a part of your dog's dental care routine.
LONG-LASTING DOG CHEW TREATS: Designed to provide hours of chewing pleasure, keeping your dog engaged and helping to reduce destructive chewing behavior.
DELICIOUS AND DIGESTIBLE: These chews for dogs are not only tasty but also easily digestible, making them a perfect treat for your furry friend.
description: Product Description Pack of 100 x 12.5cm Natural Munchy Sticks Ingredients Munchy Rawhide Directions Store in a dry place See more
